chunks.title: Vision of Isaiah and Judgment on Judah
chunks.reason: Introduces the prophet's vision and describes the spiritual sickness and desolation of the land.

chunks.title: Call to Repentance and Divine Offer
chunks.reason: God addresses the leaders as Sodom and Gomorrah, critiques their worship, and offers a choice between blessing and judgment.

chunks.title: Oracle of the Faithless City
chunks.reason: Describes the corruption of Jerusalem's leaders, promises purification through judgment, and concludes with the fate of the wicked.
